info.title: Rappi Restaurant Integrations API
info.description: Rappi's public API for restaurant integrations. Allows partners to manage menus, orders, stores, availability, webhooks, and scheduling for their restaurant operations on the Rappi platform.

get.description: Returns the collection of menus created by the partner.

post.description: Adds or updates a menu in a store.

get.description: Returns the current approval status of a menu for a store.
Returns the latest menu created for a store.
Returns a list of new orders created.
Returns a list of new orders created in SENT status.

put.description: Takes an order to be prepared with specified cooking time.

post.description: Confirms that the order is ready to be picked up.

get.description: Returns the latest events for an order.
Returns the list of stores for the authenticated client.

put.description: Updates a store to integrated or non-integrated status.

get.description: Returns the current menu for the store.

put.summary: Update item availability by Rappi ID
put.description: Controls item availability by Rappi internal ID.
Mass enable availability for multiple stores.
Controls the availability of a store.
Enables availability for a specific store.

get.description: Returns the configured webhooks for an event.

put.description: Adds stores to the webhook event.
Changes the URL for a list of stores in the webhook.
Resets the secret for a webhook event.
Enables or disables webhooks for an event.

get.description: Gets the schedule for a corridor in a store.

post.description: Creates a schedule for a corridor in a store.

put.description: Updates the schedule for a corridor in a store.

post.description: Creates a schedule for a store.

bearerAuth.description: Bearer token obtained via OAuth2 client credentials from Auth0. Pass as x-authorization header.
